Blackened Alloy Longsword  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 29
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV POISON: +3
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Beginning Combo
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2003 at 7:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250871744
274 posts
Once you get duel weild, Try this as your primary and the silvery war axe as your off hand. Do to the low delay of the war axe your duel weild skill will go quickly
▲ Page top
How to Purchase
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2002 at 11:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784736391
1 post
How does one purchase this item?
▲ Page top
RE: How to Purchase
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2003 at 10:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789474850
19 posts
B-A-Z-A-A-R
▲ Page top
RE: How to Purchase
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2004 at 3:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592762773342
Scholar
1,463 posts
If you can't find it in the Bazaar, go to PoK and /ooc that you're wanting to buy this sword. Ask if anyone has one rotting in the bank or on an alt. Try it when PoK is crowded, and even then you might have to be persistent. But I got one for free this way! I was willing to pay, but the person just gave it to me - plus a couple of nice pieces of armor.
▲ Page top
This and Icetooth's
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2002 at 6:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570759382
3 posts
I find that this in secondary with icetooth's claws as my prime it is a devastating combination for low-mid levels My lvl 16 war is dual weilding this and it RoXoRs :)) Just my 2cp l8rs
▲ Page top
RE: This and Icetooth's
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2002 at 11:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1639354677644
Scholar
57 posts
I agree. I use the same combo on my 16 WAR and it works beautifully. The only thing I find disappointing is that it doesn't have any special graphic, but for what I get out of it, I'll live.

Edited, Sun Nov 17 23:07:40 2002

QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2002 at 7:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766512077
41 posts
Got one form a twink of 40pp
▲ Page top
wasted bals
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2002 at 3:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767122862
12 posts
i let three of these rot one day as they are lore and i already had one...did several shouts to the zone to see if anyone wanted and not one bite...go figure :(
they go for 50pp on vaeselle
▲ Page top
drops
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2002 at 1:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362182649
15 posts
Spent a night off from hi lvl raiding to farm some black alloy armor for my alts and to make newbies happy. Forgot this and Babs also in zone. Lord Picklaw constantly wields either this or Babs. Black alloy coif IMHO is best item in runneyeye. insane to see 6sv all helm in a 25-30 lvl zone. Lord drops coif about 1 in 3 chances. Also see this on battle lord paluk on occasion. After killing Battle wizard Ulak I have yet to find anything of value on him.
Also notice black alloy tunic drops more frequently than any other armor piece. U would think with highest AC it would be most uncommon. But shoulder/legs seem to be the most rare.
I used this armor set from lvl 1-20. My pk strategy was to hideout in dark areas around blackburrow/everfrost area. Barbarians runnin from BB to bank their loot had a hell of a time seeing my halfling rog. player spins around for a looksee and i would time a bs just right.
Morrhumyn Thanhumyn
49 Rogue

Edited, Tue Aug 13 03:15:03 2002
▲ Page top
Nice sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2002 at 3:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781250381
24 posts
Best chance of getting one of these is to go to the bottom floor and pull and kill Pickclaw DESTROYERS. My group managed to get 3 of these in a 1 hour session down there. Not exactly a common drop but we weren't exactly wetting ourselves everytime one dropped

Acts as a lightsource, same intensity and colour tint as a Greater Lightstone...

Looks like a_longsword, same as any rusty, bronze or finesteel longsword out there using the old-world longsword graphic. Black with grey edges? Honestly, do you guys think before you hammer away at your keyboard like a chimpanzee on crack?

Edited, Sat Jul 27 04:07:15 2002
▲ Page top
New Buy (and a Newbie)
QuoteReply
# May 26 2002 at 6:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759302015
3 posts
None of the prices I've seen on this site even remotely reflect what I've paid for things on my server, The Nameless, I paid 10pp for an Obsidian scimitar (though I believe that was mostly the kindness of a stranger -- still have it :) ), I paid 12 pp and an HQ Bear pelt for a Runic Carver, and received a shaped Ashen bow w/silk (again mostly the kindness of a stranger --still have the Carver, gave the bow to another aspiring Ranger ), and now, I just bought this blade for 30 pp, from a player who was hawking his goods in GFay. No favors here, I believe I paid near what the market was bearing, plus or minus. The player seemed to be experienced, and was far traveled, go figure.

I have read that prices fluctuate quite greatly from server to server, but from other incidents and feedback from friends it seems that our server is consistantly coming in at 1/4, or less, of the going prices listed here.
▲ Page top
RE: New Buy (and a Newbie)
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 11:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1626654056935
107 posts
Most of the prices I've seen here are good on the server I play on (Innoruuk). Actually there is a lot of price gouging that goes on and I've used the prices posted here to wrangle most people down. I had been trying to buy BA for my rogue and it was just too expensive for me. A few nights ago some person sold me the Ba armplates, Legplates, Mail and waistband for 1pp per AC. That was a great deal. Of course the guy had bags of the stuff that he was selling so I guess he could afford to drop it that cheap.
▲ Page top
RE: New Buy (and a Newbie)
QuoteReply
# May 30 2002 at 9:13 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250544083
Scholar
30 posts
hay friend, just to let you know you are on the most twinked server in the game.. everything on allakhazams is about 300 % high for our server, except for the REALY high end stuff. So unless you are looking to buy gear from dragons, you can pretty much divide the prices here by 3 or 4. just so you know, and welcome to the nameless.

1 post
I got mine from a merchant in the Bazaar who didn't even con amiable for only 84 plat. Gotta wonder about them merchants sometimes.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 26 2002 at 1:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) crystalized blade is much better than this. i hit for 29 ususally and i have only 88strength. even though i sold it and got a BABS for free from some idiot lowbie
RE: better blade
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2002 at 9:25 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Sure crystallized blade is better, for sk or pally. For anyone else, its useless, since they can't use it. The new Centi Longswords are better than any of these, but not everyone has 1k to spend on a sword. BTW, the reason the "idiot lowbie" gave you a babs is probably because he's someone's alt, and his main can waltz into runnyey any day and pick one up. He was doing you a favor, and you call him an idiot. Go figure.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 10 2002 at 10:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HAHA he's soo right. your the idiot. WTF your the one with 88 str using a babs. my necro has 88 str.

Cool Weapon
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2002 at 1:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767376091
6 posts
One cool thing about this sword, especially for barbs and humans and others (are there any?) without night vision is that it is a light source. Just another helpful bonus of this sword.
▲ Page top
Weapons
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2001 at 4:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772015958
84 posts
Errr im using this and wak of the frozen skies, i switch them around a LOT. it's good for damage, i hit for 20 with it and delay is ok, sometimes ill put the wak in offhand, but since it has less a chance to proc(my dex is pretty nice so it procs a lot) i keep the BALS in offhand. btw im a ranger so i hope this helps rangers a little.

btw if anyone is selling a velium warsword or shortblade on cazic send me a tell on atwight please. :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 03 2001 at 4:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I MANAGED TO FLIPOFF THESE GOBIS MANY TIMES WHEN I WAS NEAR TO EXTINCTION...WORSE THAN FEARED CUZ THEN I HIT THEM FOR ABOUT 80DMG...AND MISS VERY LITTLE...'GOTA LOVE THEM GULLS'

# Dec 23 2001 at 4:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763922708
11 posts
Got one of these last night and it doesn't look like a normal longsword, it looks like a bronze sword.. this may be a SoL addition don't know because I can't remember what bronze looked like before SoL. it's a nice sword and hits in mid twenties and is fast, I thoroughly recommend the trip to RE citadel to get this weapon for mid 20s chars.
